steps.t: Thorían is in central Duillond, near the workbenches. You should go and ask Thorían for handfasting cords.
The bolt of silk is in a crate at Brethilas' shop in Duillond. You should get a bolt of silk and bring it to be cut at the tailor's workbench.
Cut the silk cloth into ribbons at Thorían's workbench in Duillond. You should cut the silk into pretty ribbons.
Thorían is in central Duillond, near the workbenches. You should bring the cut ribbons to Thorían.
The metalsmith Dringlaer can be found in central Duillond, and the flowers bloom in and around the city. Thorían asked you to gather flowers and speak…
Thorían can be found in Duillond. You have gathered the charms and flowers. Return to Thorían.
Celairel is south of Duillond. Bring the handfasting cords to Celairel.
